data.current_role_summary: Entrepreneurial leader specializing in AI-driven B2B automation, currently building multi-agent systems for enterprise procurement at Lio.
role_summary_bullets: Core Identity & Mission: Founder focused on transforming traditional enterprise operations through autonomous AI workforce technologies.
Domain Mastery: Deep technical expertise in procurement workflows, NLP-based security, and product architecture.
Quantifiable Impact: Built Lio as an AI procurement solution backed by YCombinator, targeting global enterprise process efficiency.
Strategic Scope: Demonstrated ability to scale from early-stage venture building to technical product management within corporate innovation frameworks.
Leadership Philosophy: Prioritizes hands-on product ownership, rapid prototyping, and fostering entrepreneurial ecosystems.
Current Momentum: Leading a YC-backed venture while maintaining an active presence in Munich’s startup innovation community.
